'''wafosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaman|zaman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaman|zaman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wafosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæfesheth|wæfesheth]] || [[word:wæfeshej|wæfeshej]] || [[word:wæfeshesh|wæfeshesh]] || [[word:wæfeshe|wæfeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafofoshoth|wafofoshoth]] || [[word:wafofoshoj|wafofoshoj]] || [[word:wafofoshosh|wafofoshosh]] || [[word:wafofosho|wafofosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafoshoth|wafoshoth]] || [[word:wafoshoj|wafoshoj]] || [[word:wafoshosh|wafoshosh]] || [[word:wafosho|wafosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafofshoth|wafofshoth]] || [[word:wafofshoj|wafofshoj]] || [[word:wafofshosh|wafofshosh]] || [[word:wafofshof|wafofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wafoshotho|wafoshotho]] || [[word:wafoshojo|wafoshojo]] || [[word:wafoshosho|wafoshosho]] || [[word:wafoshoko|wafoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wafoshoth|wafoshoth]] || [[word:wafoshoj|wafoshoj]] || [[word:wafoshosh|wafoshosh]] || [[word:wafosho|wafosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wafoshothol|wafoshothol]] || [[word:wafoshojol|wafoshojol]] || [[word:wafoshoshol|wafoshoshol]] || [[word:wafoshokol|wafoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wafoshothotho|wafoshothotho]] || [[word:wafoshojojo|wafoshojojo]] || [[word:wafoshoshosho|wafoshoshosho]] || [[word:wafoshoko|wafoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wafoshothon|wafoshothon]] || [[word:wafoshojon|wafoshojon]] || [[word:wafoshoshon|wafoshoshon]] || [[word:wafoshokon|wafoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wafoshothoro|wafoshothoro]] || [[word:wafoshojoro|wafoshojoro]] || [[word:wafoshoshoro|wafoshoshoro]] || [[word:wafoshokoro|wafoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
